entry.title: Re: ECP Mash up errors
entry.content: As per screenshot the error is showing inside the mashup. Is it that service specific or it appears on any mashup functionality? you may set up a external breakpoint to the error code and reproduce the issue. Once it stops you may try to find why it shows that error.

entry.title: Is it possible to create a report in SAP SIGNAVIO Explorer that includes the folder structure?
entry.content:
Is it possible to create a report in SAP SIGNAVIO that includes the folder structure?


I have mapped the organisational structure from level 1 to level 4 in folders. I have then stored the associated BPMN and value chains in the level 4 folder structure. Now I want to see this folder structure when I create a report, not only the BPMN and the value chain on level 4. Is there a way to include the type "folder" in my report?

entry.title: Re: Client Copy by SCCLN - Client Deletion by SCC5N
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check the following SAP Knowledge Base Article:

  • 1537913 - Client Copy: Local, Remote, Export/Import & deletion - - > 3. Delete a Client

Also please check the "See Also" section where other related documents listed.

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: C4C Workflow rules SLA violation
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I hope that you are doing well.

I configured in C4C a workflow rule which is scheduled to send out notification to the HR+Manager when the Due Date of the ticket is almost completed and the ticket is still in progress/open/pending. The rule: 

Scheduling
4
Hour(s)
Before
Completion Due
Execute this Rule if
Conditions are met
 
 
Country 
Equal to
 IND
 
 
Group 1
 
AND
Priority
Equal to
Normal
 
 
Group 1
 
AND
Send Automated E-Mails
Equal to
Yes
 
 
Group 1
 
AND
Status
Not equal to
Completed

The idea is that these notifications should be sent only if the ticket is not completed or closed. The issue is that the notifications are sent even if the ticket is completed or closed.

Do you have any recommendations on how this?

Thank you,

Eli

entry.title: Re: SM62 Event: CL_BATCH_EVENT does not trigger immediately
entry.content:
Hi @Wilbert_Jeuken,

Really sorry for super late reply, but I did not pursue this further with SAP because our client needed immediate resolution and therefore, I implemented alternative solution (using Background Task in FM and directly submitting the program) instead of originally using background unit FM and raising event in SM62 to run the program.

entry.title: BOM component not showing in PI Sheet but shows on process order
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

The new BOM component is not showing in CO60 (PI Sheet) but shows on process order (COR3). Please help. Existing BOM components appear, but when I try to add a new component to the BOM it doesn't pull through to to the PI sheet.

entry.title: Re: Client Copy by SCCLN - Client Deletion by SCC5N
entry.content: Really clear answer! Thank you.

entry.title: SAP GTS E4H, Manage Blocked Documents concatenation of name and description for specific fields
entry.content:
In Manage Blocked Documents, i see that:

FT Organization column has concatenated in one field  - description of the FTO and in the brackets the name of the FTO 

Ctry/Reg of Dep. column has concatenated in one field - description of the country and in the brackets country code 

Cty/Reg of Destination key column has concatenated in one field - description of the country and in the brackets country code 

Is there any way we can change this, and separate the name and the description in 2 columns?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Application to show Data from ODATA S4 System in tubular format
entry.content:
Great blog, 

Helped me to configure Odata to Build Apps.

I'm facing a problem in changing date format in basic table. How can I do modifications of certain fields of the table?

Thankyou 🙂

entry.title: Re: How do I eliminate a page header from appearing on every page?
entry.content: Please add a tag about the product you are talking about...

entry.title: Re: Expose CDS View as OData Service/API in S/4HANA 2002...

entry.title: Re: Weekday Funktion in SIGNAL?
entry.content:
Hello Niels,
see DATE_ADD | SAP Help Portal. Otherwise - can you not amend the data before the load, so add the grace date before?

entry.title: Elevating Customer Engagement: Harnessing the Power of SAP Chatbots for a Personalized Experience
entry.content:
In below blog series, It is all about Benefits and usecases of custom Chatbot that I have built.

Blog 1 : Why Chatbots in SAP ?
Blog 2 : How Chatbot can help Vendors? 
Blog 3 : How Chatbot can help Customers? ( This Blog )

Introduction

In our previous entries, we laid the groundwork by discussing the transformative role of chatbots in standardizing operations and empowering vendors within the SAP ecosystem. This time, we shift our focus towards the end-users who are the heart of any business—the customers. Chatbots are not just operational tools; they are vital in forging stronger relationships with customers by providing personalized, responsive, and engaging experiences. In our third blog, we delve into how SAP chatbots are redefining customer engagement and driving satisfaction to new heights.

Personalization at Scale

Customers today expect more than generic responses; they seek personalized interactions that make them feel valued. SAP chatbots, powered by advanced analytics and machine learning, can deliver individualized experiences at scale. By analyzing customer data, chatbots can provide tailored recommendations, remember past interactions, and even anticipate needs before the customer articulates them. This level of personalization fosters a sense of loyalty and trust—a critical component in the customer journey.

Real-time Support and Convenience

The immediacy of chatbot communication means customers can get the support they need exactly when they need it. Be it tracking an order, resolving a service issue, or seeking product information, SAP chatbots offer a convenient access point for swift resolutions. This 24/7 availability not only enhances customer satisfaction but also streamlines the support process, making it more efficient for both the customer and the business.

Enhancing the Omnichannel Experience

In an age where customers interact with brands across multiple channels, SAP chatbots ensure a consistent and seamless experience. Whether it's on a website, mobile app, or social media platform, chatbots can integrate across these touchpoints to maintain continuity in customer interactions. This omnipresence is crucial in an omnichannel strategy, ensuring customers receive the same quality of service, regardless of the platform.

Feedback and Continuous Improvement

SAP chatbots are invaluable for gathering customer feedback in real-time. This instantaneous input allows businesses to quickly adapt and refine their offerings. Chatbots can prompt customers for feedback post-interaction, ensuring that the business stays attuned to customer sentiment and expectations, and uses this data to drive continuous improvement in products and services.

Overcoming Barriers with Advanced Capabilities

Our custom SAP chatbot solution is designed to overcome common barriers in customer communication. By employing sophisticated language processing and AI-driven understanding, the chatbots can handle complex queries with ease. They are also equipped to escalate issues to human representatives when necessary, ensuring that customers are not left without a solution.

Conclusion

As we continue to explore the potential of chatbots in the SAP landscape, it's clear that their benefits extend well beyond operational efficiencies. For customers, SAP chatbots represent a new era of engagement, marked by personalization, convenience, and seamless service. By embracing these intelligent conversational agents, businesses can create a customer experience that not only meets but exceeds expectations, fostering lasting relationships and driving brand loyalty.

Stay tuned for our next entry, where we'll explore the technical intricacies of SAP chatbot integration and the future of AI in customer service.

To learn more about how SAP solutions can enhance your customer engagement, connect with our team of experts at Cygnet Digital and take the next step in your digital transformation journey.

entry.title: Re: CBTA Execution error for FIORI Scripts
entry.content:
Hello
CBTA client 3.0.10.1 is outdated. I would suggest to download latest version 3.0.21.5 
from SWDC (cbta30SP21_5-20010323.exe)
See note 3378891 - CBTA 3.0 Release Documentation SP21

Also implement latest version of the Note 2029868 - CBTA - Runtime Library - Fixes & Improvements in solman system and check again.

Best Regards
Pedro

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh Service Key Creation failed
entry.content:
Hi @Ilyass01,

you have already linked the answer for your question. 😉

When creating a service-key you only need to provide a name for the service-key but no JSON parameters - this is not required. As a result you will get the service-key containing the unique credentials for your Event Mesh service instance.

Best regards,
Tobias

entry.title: Re: Application Job parameters do not refresh
entry.content: Hello, thanks for the answer. So, this will be available in the next public cloud release and the next private cloud release? Greetings Felix

entry.title: Hello, can you please help me in getting logged in user Info UI integration cards in sap build
entry.content: Hello, can you please help me in getting logged in user Info in UI integration cards in sap build.

entry.title: Re: Analysis and Recommended Settings of the Security Audit Log (SM19 / RSAU_CONFIG, SM20 / RSAU_REA
entry.content: Hi @Frank_Buchholz, due to the latest SAP Community update, the layout of your blog post looks horrible now (huge blank spaces), if you don't mind could you fix it please?

entry.title: Re: Layered Bars in Bar chart are reset after replacing t...
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

The formatting as layered bars disappears as soon as all measures are removed. But if you let as least one stay there it holds the format. So, in my case, to change all (two) measures I must do the following:

  • Remove old measure #1
  • Add new measure #1
  • Remove old measure #2
  • Add new measure #2

Maybe this helps someone else, too.

Regards
Tim

entry.title: Re: SAC: hide stories shared by other users
entry.content:
Hi William,

Thanks for your reply. No, in our case we just want users to be able to tidy up the top level file structure for themselves. Users won't be owners of most of the folders and objects within that file structure.

Thanks,

Hugh

entry.title: Be an Expert with PLM System Integration Support Content!
entry.content:
Recently, many of you have asked where to find detailed information on the setup of different integration scenarios via PLM system integration. As you know, PLM system integration enables a seamless transfer of product-relevant data between SAP S/4HANA or SAP ERP and an external PLM system, allowing for bi-directional process integration.  

We are happy to inform you that you can now access a comprehensive set of support knowledge directly from the SAP Help Portal.  
 
Start today and explore the PLM system integration expert content here. Enjoy 

  • Best practices regarding configuration per object type 
  • How-to information on the activation of our standard content via BC Sets 
  • A closer look at error messages and what they tell you. 

Also, learn how you can test your integration, even without an external PLM system in place. 

Check out our our overview video to get a first glimpse!

Now, it's your turn to unleash the full potential of PLM system integration!

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
Hi,

We will convert our current goal plan to the new goals in May, as well as launching a new goal plan for next year. We will convert both plans to the new goals as both will need to be editable for an overlap period.

New goals do not support tasks, but users with the current goal plan will already have existing tasks. Tasks would previously have been carried over to the Other Details tab of the end of year performance review.

I have 2 questions:

  1. When the current goal plan is converted will users be able to see their existing tasks?
  2. Will those existing tasks be carried over to the Other Details tab of the performance review for this year?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: CBTA Edge issue
entry.content:
Hi Cherry,

All CBTA settings are fine and also on the latest version.

entry.title: Re: CBTA Edge issue
entry.content: Hi Cherry

entry.title: Re: CBTA Edge issue
entry.content:
Hi Cherry,

The issue is not CBTA but edge crashing when opening via CBTA.

Edge log Start Session command failed: WebDriverCmdStartSession: [sessionId 6ca4c67c0be9ac7a0244190886603b86, status 33 - message: session not created: Microsoft Edge failed to start: exited normally. (session not created: DevToolsActivePort file doesn't exist) (The process started from msedge location C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe is no longer running, so msedgedriver is assuming that msedge has crashed.) (Driver info: msedgedriver=122.0.2365.92 (908657ec17be9ad27101d76cdae7448c824b705c),platform=Windows NT 10.0.19045 x86_64)]

entry.title: Re: Unable to change package from $TMP to Z***
entry.content: You could try using /nse38 -> goto -> object directory entry. Simple and fast

entry.title: Unable to create HANA Cloud instance
entry.content: Hi all, I am unable to create HANA Cloud instance. It keep prompting maximum of instance create but I have not create any HANA Cloud instance under this subaccount. I did created a HANA Cloud instance under another deleted subaccount before this, is it the cause? if it is, what can I do to get rid of this error?

entry.title: Re: Weekday Funktion in SIGNAL?
entry.content:
Hi Niels,

you can use the DATE_PART function in SIGNAL to achieve this:

SELECT
    "case_id",
    DATE_PART('day_of_week', (SELECT FIRST("end_time"))) AS "Day of week"
FROM THIS_PROCESS

You just need to use the argument 'day_of_week', as you can see here: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-intelligence/signal-guide/date-part?locale=en-US

entry.title: FSCM credit management: automatic release of deliveries with prepayments
entry.content:
Dear experts,
 
we have FSCM in place and use credit management. Our release is  S/4 2020/21 SPS 3. 
I have questions regarding the following process:
a customer has no credit limit and pays always in advance. The prepayment amount covers the order/ delivery amount, so that the credit limit check is generally positive. But the concerned deliveries always land up in SCASE and need to get unblocked manually. Is this the standard process? (I understand, if yes, because it's better to control it every time instead of trusting the customer. I just want the confirmation, as I haven't found any possibility to change the process 😊)
We would prefer, that such deliveries will not get blocked, when the prepayment is available and the amount equal or higher than the delivery. 
The same logic can be applied, when the customer balance is sufficient - I mean, when customer has overpayments or credit notes (debit > credit). Does SAP standard provide any possibility to set it up - by customizing, by BAdI, by user exit or else? 
 
Thanks a lot and best regards, Carina

entry.title: Re: Custom domain for multiple subaccounts
entry.content: hi Martin, Is there a way to achieve this without CF CLI and directly through custom domain application in SAP BTP? Regards, Smitha

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/68bf513362174d54b58cddec28794093/326e64dbe120405e852046afa5de2235.html?q=Service%20Catalog

entry.title: Re: Application Job parameters do not refresh

But then the job could not be planned once again, because of the error "Zustand der Ressource (Entität) wurde bereits geändert (If-Match)". Is it not possible to recreate it with the same name?

entry.title: Re: Be an Expert with PLM System Integration Support Content!

entry.title: FSCM credit management: credit check step 140
entry.content:
Dear all, 
 
we have FSCM in place and use credit management. Our release is  S/4 2020/21 SPS 3. 
I found the new check step "140 check credit limit validity" in OSS note 2926009 and I would like to know:
  • what exactly does this step do? Could anyone explain with an example? 
  • would is be possible to implement this step also to our release 20/21 SPS3, although it's mentioned, that it's available in a later release? 
Many thanks in advance and best regards, Carina

entry.title: Re: Firebase legacy Cloud Messaging API will be discontinued
entry.content: Isabelle, can you please tell when could we expect a note for SAP Marketing 2020 release containing adoption for the new Firebase API?

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements List report Grid table is not scrollable
entry.content: Is there an error on the console? Can you provide a screenshot?

entry.title: Scale Up Subscription Initiatives with SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management
entry.content:
SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management (BRIM) is a perfect add-on bundle for RISE for SAP customers who want to grow recurring revenues while minimizing revenue leakage with a scalable, automated order-to-cash process. Here are some examples of how customers are using the BRIM bundle:  

  • Printer manufacturer transformed into a managed print services provider by creating subscription bundles that include printer, installation, and maintenance services provided by a partner with customer-specific pricing that includes a monthly recurring fee, fees based on the number of pages printed, and one-time installation fee.  
  • Media company created a single, pre-integrated order-to-cash process to support global launches of new content streaming services with end-to-end management of the subscription lifecycle, support for partner and advertiser revenue-share agreements, high-performance scalability to manage direct-to-consumer volumes, and end-to-end transaction traceability from sales to the general ledger. 
  • Multinational energy company built a subscription platform to support new ways to monetize their services, such as billing and pricing flexibility to support customer-specific pricing and promotions, pre-paid products and new rate plans based on usage patterns, real-time customer notifications based on usage, and the infrastructure to collect and aggregate large volumes of meter data for real-time rating and billing. 
  • Technology company automated their invoice-to-cash process to make sure they were correctly billing for all their services, including subscription and non-subscription services. By scaling for high volumes of accounts receivables, automating complex revenue-share settlement, and supporting compliance with region-specific reporting requirements, the company gained end-to-end financial traceability, trackability, and integrity. 

 

 

 

Pre-integrated with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, the BRIM bundle offers an end-to-end subscription and revenue management capabilities and includes the following components: 

 

  • Subscription Order Management provides comprehensive subscription lifecycle management. Design and model offers that combine multiple pricing and billing options (e.g., recurring, usage, one-time, prepay, installment payment). Create bundle subscriptions with products, services, and projects combined into a single offer. Manage complex multi-sided business models by managing partner revenue-share agreements.  

 

  • Convergent Charging provides flexible pricing, rating, and packaging management with support for high transactional volumes. Designed to process very high volumes, real-time and offline charging are supported with automatic calculation of partner payments and discounts in addition to support for allowance and balance management. An intuitive interface allows business users to model and update simple to complex pricing logic. 

 

  • Convergent Invoicing aggregates billing data from multiple sources to offer a single, marketing-ready customer invoice with complete billing and payment details. Invoice-level discounting is available based on amount, percentage, or other attributes with flexible billing cycle management and ability to create on-demand invoices. High-volume error correction and reversal processes available in times of outages. 

 

  • Contract Accounting streamlines high volume accounts receivables processes with integration to SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Provides customer payment management with centralized subledger of receivables and automatic settlement of partner revenue-share and rebate payables. Automatic rules-based payment matching, collections, and dunning with centralized customer dispute management and management of customer credit.  

 

RISE with SAP customers can take advantage of the SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management add-on package to: 

 

  • Transform from a product to as-a-service business 
  • Add new revenue streams by offering subscriptions to digital services 
  • Scale for high volumes and minimize revenue leakage with automated order-to-cash 
  • Quickly launch innovative offers using a variety of pricing, billing, and bundling options 
  • Automate personalization of customer-specific offers and options 

 

For more information, visit these resources: 

  • Solution Brief: Accelerate subscription monetization on private cloud 
  • 2-minute Product Video 
  • Product web page

entry.title: Re: Error during oData API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV in SAP Integ...
entry.content:
Hi @Ivan-Mirisola , i was able to solve the problem. I deleted to oData Adapter and switched to HTTP again. Now it works 🙂

Thanks for you support.

entry.title: Theme in Fiori Launchpad Switched to Horizon After Upgrading to S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
We recently performed an upgrade on our system to S/4HANA 2023. Following the upgrade, we've noticed that the theme of Fiori Launchpad has changed to Horizon.
Is it correct to assume that such changes are a typical effect of the system upgrade?

Can you suggest how to change the theme in SAP Fiori Launchpad from SAP Horizon to another theme, such as SAP Belize, for all users?





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Theme in Fiori Launchpad Switched to Horizon After Up...
entry.content:
To set the default theme in Fiori Launchpad, please check the latest SAP Help documentation: SAP Fiori Launchpad - Setting Themes for the Launchpad and make the configuration as described in Setting Parameters in SAP Fiori Customizing. 

===

  • in ABAP Customizing using the parameter THEMING_DEFAULT_THEME

    See Launchpad Configuration Parameters.

===

The default setting of parameter  THEMING_DEFAULT_THEME has changed from Quartz theme to Morning Horizon since S/4HANA 2023 FPS00.

entry.title: Re: Event mesh S/4hana on-premise
entry.content:
Hi @mark_fryu,

It looks like you just need to provide the correct topic subscription pattern in the queue configuration.

If you are able to consume all events when using the "*" topic subscription, we can easily identify the correct topic patterns from there.

  1. In the EM admin UI select the messaging client where you have defined your queue (e.g. message_consumer).
  2. Open the "Test" tab.
  3. In the Consume Messages section, from the dropdown select the queue that holds all the events.
  4. Click the Consume Message button. It will consume the oldest message in the queue.
  5. The details for the consumed message are displayed. Select the Message Properties tab.
  6. x-address contains the full topic the message was sent to.

In the example you can see that the topic is defined as:

topic:sap/S4HANAOD/S4HC/ce/sap/s4/beh/businesspartner/v1/BusinessPartner/Changed/v1

So if I want to subscribe all BusinessPartner events, you would need to create a topic subscription in your queue configuration that looks like:

sap/S4HANAOD/S4HC/ce/sap/s4/beh/businesspartner/v1/BusinessPartner/*
or
sap/S4HANAOD/S4HC/ce/sap/s4/beh/businesspartner/*

 This would subscribe all kinds of BusinessParter events. No matter if this is a change, create or delete event.

Another option would be to check the log entries on the S/4HANA side. There we would also be able to identify the exact topics the events have been sent to.

I hope this helps you getting started with the configuration.

Best regards,
Tobias

entry.title: Re: Get logged in user data in SAP Work Zone

BR,
Yilin

entry.title: Re: How can we export all entityTypes along with properti...

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
@jtrue If you convert an existing template, you will not be able to see Tasks on the Goals UI as that field is not supported in Latest Goals but you can see them in Reporting (if you don't convert, then you may still see them in Legacy View)

Yes on the Form you can see it, but if you want to edit the goal, in the edit dialogue you won't be able to see it.

entry.title: Auto Assignment of Assignment Group in Service Now Incident via SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi,

We have set up SAP Cloud ALM External API Management using one of the "built-in" mappings for ServiceNow Incident creation. ServiceNow Incidents are being successfully created from SAP Cloud ALM for alerts.
But the Incidents created from SAP Cloud ALM do not have an "assignment group" value for the ServiceNow teams that should process the Incident. Help us to assign the "assignment group" using the API which is used for this configuration.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Auto Assignment of Assignment Group in Service Now In...
entry.content:
The "built-in" mappings are provided as a starting point for Customers to get integration between SAP Cloud ALM and their external ticketing/messaging systems up and running.
It provides the bare minimum mapping required to achieve its described purpose. 
In this scenario, it contains just the mandatory information required by the default ServiceNow Incident for Incident creation. 

You should create a copy of the "built-in" mapping you are using for ServiceNow in the External API Management app, and configure your subscription to use your copy instead of the "built-in" option.
The copied mapping should be edited to meet your business use case and needs. 

The ServiceNow API for Incident creation uses the Table API.
The guide includes information about sending "assignment_group" parameter data with your request. 
Use that guide (remembering to select your specific ServiceNow version) to familiarize yourself with the attributes and values the ServiceNow API accepts for Incident creation.

The SAP Cloud ALM APIs Mapping guide outlines the use of the "choices" rules which can be specified in a mapping. 
The "choices" rules function similar to a switch/case statement in programming languages.
An event attribute from the SAP Cloud ALM event can be specified as the "source" and its value as the "when" detail.
The "destination" attribute of the "choices" rule is used to specify the target attribute in the target API (in this case, "assignment_group"), and "then" specifies the value that should be assigned when the condition is met.

You need to use the information from both guides to configure your copied mapping beyond what is provided "built-in".

entry.title: Re: Hello I want to do SAC planning certification, but I...
entry.content:
Hi @Khader1,

The certification structure has been updated. SAP Analytics Cloud is now all combined in 1 certification: 

https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-data-analyst-sap-analytics-cloud

This includes planning. I'm not sure about Group Reporting.

entry.title: KBA 3452616 bank migration
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support, I've created the memo record but how can I make the journal entry? I've check also KBA 3452616 but can't find this. We have to migrate the begin balance of our bank.

Best regards,

Rene Vijverberg

entry.title: Re: View on Enitity overwrites Entity on Save in Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @OlenaT ,
thank you for your response!

I understand now that the association is an issue. My follow up question now is, do you support multiple compositions in the parent entity? We rebuild the data model to the following: 

entity InsuranceContract : managed, cuid {
 ...
ContractDetails                                   : Composition of many ContractDetails on  ContractDetails.InsuranceContract         =      $self
                                                        and ContractDetails.contractDetailStatus.code not in ('CANCELED', 'REVERSED'
                                                        );
 Reversed                                          : Composition of many ContractDetails
                                                        on Reversed.InsuranceContract = $self
                                                        and (
                                                             Reversed.contractDetailStatus.code = 'CANCELED'
                                                          or Reversed.contractDetailStatus.code = 'REVERSED'
                                                        );
}

If you do, we still expierence some issues. With this data model, we lose all ContractDetails upon saving a draft in each table. I've noticed with the debugging in sqlite a DELETE is called after saving the draft on the entity ContractDetails. The DELETEs on the draft table entries make sense, but not on the data. 

We also run into issues in different services. We have a Service1, which is available for a customer for example. There we have a view on ContractDetails, which filters out relevant ContractDetails for the customer e.g. contractDetailStatus.code != TRANSFERED. In Service2 we have an overview of transfered ContractDetails, therefore, a view on ContractDetails == TRANSFERED. If the customer transferes these details in Service1, the details should show up in Service2. They do to some degree, but Service2 shows only the last Draft session, so if the customer saves their draft, only the transfered details would show up. If the customer does another save, the details of the first save get lost. 

Would you be so kind an offer me a proposal of how to implement this scenario I've described? 

Best Regards, 

Tanja

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App After Deployed into BTP getting Error while Open App Error GET --500 Missing zone
entry.content:
Hi Mithun,

Were you able to resolve the issue. Even i am facing the same problem. 

If you find the solution please do post the answer here

Regards,

Ragavie

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
Hello @kenneth_dalvik ,

I've been waiting for a Blog like yours already ... just wondering by what date in time it would occur 🙂

In general I agree: Many, many new inventions will never come into BW4, and you need to have a hybrid approach if you want to leverage the new capabilities to the fullest extent. Basically, for the backend it may be the right time already...

But with all your BW experience you probably have seen the same rise and fall of front-end tools and developments like me: Bex Web, Design Studio, Lumira, now SAC.... imagine, you would have build your whole front-end 3-4 times completely new (latest with BW live in SAC) ... and now you are supposed to re-build it even from scratch again - which means the Analytic Model, replacing the BW query - plus updating the SAC story on top....

Don't you think this is a veeeeeeeery long way, for all the queries your whole LOBs created during the last 20 years, and which they demand to keep in the future? You basically have to rebuild each and every Story Diagram from BW Live to Datasphere!

I know huge companies with thousands of queries, also many two-structure queries, with extensive logic in it. Ten thousands of lines of Customer Exit variable code, for hundreds of CE variables. How do you deal with that? It can be an effort of 2-3 years 😞

And one thing came to my mind lately: You can order Datasphere with 4 TB max. ... what about Scale-out customers, with e.g. 6 x 3TB size? Usually 50% is unused but even with archived data they will very quickly exceed the full 4TB. What is the solution for those? Archiving daily more data than extracting?

You see, there are still many more things to consider.

BR, Martin

entry.title: 如何限制用户显示/编辑物料主数据中财务和成本视图
entry.content:
业务需求

限制用户显示/编辑物料主数据中财务和成本视图

系统实现

1.复制标准角色PRODMASTER_SPECIALIST到自定义角色Z_PRODMASTER_SPECIALIST

点击按钮编辑后，点击维护限制

2.在常规页签下，找到物料主记录的维护状态，选择全部勾选除了会计与成本核算视图

3.将业务角色分配给用户

4.使用APP：显示物料（MM03），会计视图和成本视图无法选择：

感谢观看

entry.title: Re: Automatic Creation of One Time Payments from Time Collectors Using Integration Center
entry.content:
Hi There @PetraRana  

Thank you for your comment - glad you found the blog interesting 🙂

For the first part of your question: Basically, the integration center job will insert the one time pay components into EC first, which is inline with the integration center functionality of operating within the purview of the SuccessFactors and then, upon the standard PTP replication, the values will be passed into EC payroll. 

For the second part of your question: The question is more on how the consulting partner would advice business about the usage of this flexibility that integration center provides. Does your business need to allow for its employees to make retro changes? If yes, there is a need to test and ensure the behaviour of the automation. In certain cases, the business does not allow for the backdated changes in the employee timesheets and therefore, the changes in the values flowing down into EC Payroll does not occur. Then again, these are values cumulated into time collectors and sent to payroll - we can have the retrospective payout controls put in place in EC payroll schema to avoid backdated payments. 

A lot of possibilities and flexibility but the consulting partner will need to understand the business requirement before the automation is reused. 

Cheers,E!

entry.title: Re: Disconnecting archiving with sendout of documents fro...
entry.content:
Hi Karim, that is correct, but unfortunately we are not using SAP's KPro, we are using our archiving solution so SAP unfortunately cannot help here..

'Please note the following disclaimer: Non-SAP developed products or technologies may be integrated to SAP S/4HANA Cloud via the communication scenario SAP_COM_0597. However, SAP does not deliver or otherwise make available any pre-packed integration. As such, and notwithstanding anything to the contrary, where customer elects to integrate non-SAP developed products or technologies to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the customer is solely responsible for: (i) securing and maintaining appropriate rights respective to such non-SAP developed products or technologies; and (ii) all integration by and through this communication scenario, including any impacts such integration may have upon SAP S/4HANA Cloud.'

We are now discussing with them temporary detaching of our archiving solution from SAP completely, but it has never been done before so nobody knows if it will work and what will be the impact.

Anyways, thank you for your comments and quick feedback. I appreciate it.

Best regards
Justyna

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content: Hi @Alan_Wang when you fail the assessment to stay certified you can try it again. There are unlimited trials possible for the assessment. When you failed I would recommend that you dive deeper into the content to prepare for the assessment and then do a second try.

entry.title: Re: How to read MPL attachments from odata api as part of...
entry.content: Thats right. it was overwriting. the script was placed after the content modifier. Now its moved before and its working. thanks.

entry.title: SAP BTP SDK for Android 24.4.0 is now available
entry.content:
The new version of SAP BTP SDK for Android – version 24.4.0 is now available.

You can download the latest version of the SDK either from the Software Center or the downloads section on develeopers.sap.com

The SAP BTP SDK for Android team brings some exciting new features to you with this new release.

In this blog, we will highlight some of the cool features that come with the new upgrade. To get a detailed overview of all the features released, please visit our user documentation and our API reference documentation.

 

Highlights

SDK Versioning Format

The previous major release of SAP BTP SDK for Android was 7.1. However, with our first release of 2024, we want to align the product versioning across the entire SAP Mobile Services suite. The SAP BTP SDK for Android will now follow the Year.Month.Patch format, where 'Patch' will be used for incremental updates. Therefore, this release version is 24.4.0 because we are releasing it in April 2024. Please see this SAP Note (3426373) for our releases planned for 2024.

 

Security

Restrict URLs

The "Restrict URLs" feature offers enterprises a crucial security enhancement by preventing the opening of harmful URLs within their apps. This capability safeguards users from phishing attacks, protects against malware, ensures compliance with industry standards, and enhances overall user trust. For example, an application with notes functionality can help end-users avoid opening malicious URLs present in the notes.

Restrict Print Feature

The "Restrict Print" feature equips enterprises with a vital control measure to restrict print functionality within applications. This feature helps prevent unauthorized printing, enhancing data security, and maintaining compliance with privacy regulations. For instance, an app can utilize this feature to restrict the printing of sensitive customer information stored in a table, offering an additional layer of protection against unauthorized dissemination.

 

SAP Fiori

Jetpack Compose Controls

Notable enhancements have been made to some of the controls. These include resetting selections in ListPicker, persisting selection even after a DropdownMenu is closed, and supporting alternative calendars. Additionally, the release introduces new controls such as FioriNativeFileViewer, allowing users to view PDFs, text, images, and media files, and FioriAttachment for selecting files or capturing images.

Jetpack Compose Fiori Flow

Use a built-in laser scanner instead of the camera to scan the onboarding QR code. Add illustrations on the onboarding screens and customize the sign-in user avatar.

XML-View Based Controls

Similar to the Jetpack Compose controls, the ListPicker supports resetting of selections and a circular progress indicator when loading items. Additionally, illustrations can be added to the onboarding screens.

 

OData

You can now use Kotlin to write the OData client code. Additionally, with the 24.4 release you can also define default values for key properties and use the singleton entity.

 

Wizard

Iguana

You can now use Android Studio Iguana with SAP BTP SDK for Android 24.4.

OData v4 Sample Service

Starting from the 24.4 release, when you build a sample application using the Wizard or configure the sample service in your server-side config on Mobile Services, the v4 version of OData will be used. Therefore, the app generated by the wizard will build a scaffolding app for a v4 OData endpoint rather than a v2 one.

 

Raise A Request

If you have feature ideas that the SDK should support, please raise an improvement request here: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2279.

 

Feature Summary

This blog highlights some of the features released with the new version of SAP BTP SDK for Android – 24.4.0. For details, please check the important links section.

  • New Versioning Format
  • Additional App Management Features (Restrict URL, Restrict Print)
  • New Fiori Horizon Controls on Jetpack Compose and XML based Views
  • Supporting Android Studio Iguana
  • Use Kotlin for Offline OData

 

Important Links

  • SAP BTP SDK for Android 24.4.0 (Software Center)
  • Documentation
  • API Reference

 

Acknowledgement

A huge kudos to the spectacular team that worked tirelessly, right from conceptualizing the improvements, to defining, designing, building, and eventually delivering them.

entry.title: 国内首家！信泰宜合荣获 SAP BTP 运维认证资质
entry.content:
近年来，“云”作为重要的数字化引擎，在算力、存储、工具等诸多方面成为企业加速数字化转型的重要抓手。SAP 推出了一系列基于云端的应用，特别是开发出了SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform) 平台，帮助企业客户更好地协同SAP的各类应用，深化企业数字化转型。SAP BTP 不仅融合了SAP众多合作伙伴基于不同行业最佳实践所开发的各类个性化应用，还将数据分析、人工智能、低代码开发、自动化和集成功能等整合到了统一的平台上，让客户能够快速构建和集成创新业务应用并自动优化业务流程，更轻松地配置和拓展SAP系统和第三方应用，为企业构建多云架构实现更高效的数字资产管理提供有力支撑。

SAP BTP 运维认证是 “SAP运维伙伴全球认证计划 ( Outsourcing Partner Certification, 简称：OPC )” 推出的针对 SAP BTP 产品的运维认证，目的是帮助 SAP 客户高效筛选一流的 SAP BTP 合作伙伴，同时帮助合作伙伴提升基于 SAP 产品的运维服务能力。

SAP 运维伙伴全球认证计划

作为与 SAP 合作已超过40年的全球合作伙伴，信泰宜合一直秉承着“建以致用”的服务理念，不仅围绕 SAP 的最新技术和产品为企业客户提供量体裁衣的解决方案，还在全球范围内为上线后的 SAP 客户提供高 SLA (Service Level Agreement, 服务标准) 的运维服务。 此次信泰宜合能够荣获 SAP BTP 运维认证，并成为首家在中国市场上获得 SAP BTP 运维资质的合作伙伴，证明其在系统监控、性能优化、故障排除、升级、持续开发和安全管理等方面所具备的服务能力，均符合SAP推荐的全球最佳实践，是经过 SAP 官方认证的高质量运维服务商。与此同时，信泰宜合结合其在中国积累的长达19年的 SAP 咨询服务经验，在 SAP BTP 平台上开发了基于企业主数据管理的应用，不仅繁荣了 SAP BTP 的应用生态，还拓宽了企业加速数字化转型的路径。

此外，自2007年加入 “SAP 运维伙伴全球认证计划” 以来，信泰宜合已经连续八次获得 “SAP Business Suite 解决方案运维认证” “SAP S/4HANA 解决方案运维认证” 与 “SAP HANA 运维认证”。而这与信泰宜合所长期秉承的“建以致用”的服务理念是分不开的。结合数十年运维服务经验，针对不同部署方式的 SAP 产品，信泰宜合开发出了拥有自主知识产权的红隼IT运维平台，在实现平均系统可用性达99.99%的同时，有效推动系统运维自动化、智能化、感知化和预警化。SAP 每两年一次的认证，正是对其在运维服务领域的长期技术积累和研发投入的充分肯定。

未来随着更多 SAP 新应用的开发，信泰宜合将持续围绕“建以致用”，为当前300多个现有国内客户以及更多新客户提供基于 SAP 产品的应用咨询服务和运维服务，致力于成为企业最专业、最全面、最可靠的数字化转型长期合作伙伴。

entry.title: Custom Analytical Queries / Webdynpro: Characteristic Structures: Column Width does not adjust
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i have an issue concerning the display of values in a custom analytical query using a characteristic structure. The columns won't adjust their size to the displayed values, so users have to manually resize the columns manually. Once i start the query it displays the keyfigures as follows:

Furthermore it is not possible to save the layout with an acceptable column width, so you have to resize the columns on every start of the application. I also found no setting whatsover in the editor.

I've also built a characteristic structure in a cds view manually for usage in a webdynpro analytical application. Same Problem:

I used the @AnalyticsDetails.query.onCharacteristicStructure:true annotation. The example is a structure element

 
 

 Has anyone had the same problem and can help me out here? 

Thank you very much

J.

entry.title: Customer Data Browser Fiori app for S/4Hana On-Premise environment?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We were analyzing the Customer Data Browser apps for S/4Hana 2023 On-Premise environment. I can find the apps and related mappings in Content Manager, however few related settings seems to be unavailable related to restrictions on object levels.

I wanted to understand if we can use this app on on-premise S/4Hana environment? In Fiori Apps Library I see its available only for S/4Hana Cloud, however the Tile and contents are also available on On-Premise and seems to be working for data preview.

Any suggestions would be helpful here for us in making the decision on this app usage in our on-premise environment.

Thanks,

Rakesh

entry.title: Re: Unable to replicate data due to Mass transfer ID is a...
entry.content:
Hi,

I was able to resolve it by Stopping the job in SLT. It seems that we have to stop the job in both Datasphere and SLT.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to get the business role changed date and time de...
entry.content:
Hi Muheed,

You are able to using the OData service with BusinessUserBusinessRoleAssignmentCollection to extract the business role changed date and time details.

For example:
https://myxxxx<host>.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/BusinessUserBusinessRoleAssignmentCollection

Or you can also use the filter to extract the required business user:

https://myxxx<host>.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/BusinessUserBusinessRoleAssignmentCollection?$filter=UserID eq 'xxxx'

If you'd like to export with excel document, you are able to use the Data Workbench Tool:

>> Go to Data Workbench work center -> Export work center view -> Standard Object -> Business User -> You are able to export all data or filter with conditions -> Export.

 

Best Regards,

Mei

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 
Hope you are doing well!

As a career changer from finance to IT, I am highly interested in the digital skills initiative as I aspire to pursue a career in the SAP ecosystem. Having recently relocated to Germany with my family, I am currently committed to immersing myself in the local culture and language to prepare for a career in the business consultancy spectrum. With a background in banking, financial analysis, and business development, my goal is to leverage my 10-years experience and implement technology into business processes to provide efficient solutions for real-world problems.

I am passionate about technology and the vast opportunities offered by cloud computing. I believe that participating in this initiative will allow me to enhance my technical skills, and help me find a job and start off my new career journey. I am fully committed to investing my time, effort, and dedication to make the most of this invaluable opportunity.

Thank you for considering my application.

entry.title: Re: BAPI for PA40 Create HR Mini Master Data
entry.content: PA40 Bapi

entry.title: Re: How to get the list of user's profile and privileges...
entry.content:
Hello,

This isn't VBS, but note that you may also query the database to retrieve the list of repository users/groups and their respective privileges.

SELECT name AS Member,
CASE WHEN (rght & 1=1) THEN 'Y' END AS Cnnect,
CASE WHEN (rght & 2=2) THEN 'Y' END AS Freeze,
CASE WHEN (rght & 4=4) THEN 'Y' END AS Lock_Docs,
CASE WHEN (rght & 8=8) THEN 'Y' END AS Mng_Branches,
CASE WHEN (rght & 16=16) THEN 'Y' END AS Mng_Configs,
CASE WHEN (rght & 32=32) THEN 'Y' END AS Mng_All_Docs,
CASE WHEN (rght & 64=64) THEN 'Y' END AS Mng_Users,
CASE WHEN (rght & 128=128) THEN 'Y' END AS Mng_Rep,
CASE WHEN (rght & 256=256) THEN 'Y' END AS Edit_Web,
CASE WHEN (rght & 512=512) THEN 'Y' END AS Edit_Ext_Web
FROM pmuser
ORDER by name

Additional information is available in KBA  2767881 - How to get the list of groups, their members and their rights
Kind regards

entry.title: Long running SAP BW DTP after database upgrade to IBM BLU Acceleration
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a DTP job that has been running for more than 2 days now. usually, the DTP job ends after 30 minutes but it is now running for a long time after we upgraded the database to IBM BLU Acceleration.

All other DTPs works fine except 2. I am not able to get any information from SM37 other than the job is still running and I couldn't see any locks in SM12.

How do I resolve this issue ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Webcasts / Online Workshops
entry.content: Thank you Gordon! I'll check this page from time to time!

entry.title: How to check the socket communication log
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Check the connection status between SAP and external devices at the socket communication handshake level.
Could you tell me how to check the logs (transactions)?
For example:
socket->bind()->listen()->connect()->accept()
at the log level.
If available, the transaction code and the log name to be referenced
I would appreciate it if you could tell me.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check the socket communication log
entry.content:
In the SAP system, communication with external devices and systems often occurs through various interfaces like IDoc, RFC, or web services. However, checking the socket level communication details directly from the SAP system is not straightforward. SAP typically abstracts these lower-level details.

If you suspect that there are issues at the socket level, you may need to use network monitoring or diagnostic tools outside of SAP. You can use packet capturing tools like Wireshark or tcpdump, or network monitoring software to inspect the details of network packets at the socket level.

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh Service Key Creation failed
entry.content:

Like AMQP, MQTT and REST?

entry.content: Thank you @Raj_SF

entry.title: IMPORTANT - New Master Data App (Links) - SAP Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
Hi!

After update for master data upload, I don't know how to modify the links.

First of all, before the update there was no need to load the nodes and links again to change just one link (for example). We could add that change or modify one that already existed in the data loading step.

On the other hand, right now I have loaded the nodes, links and activated a snapshot, but I want to change a specific link (I want to change the parent node). To change this link I reload the same nodes file and the same links file (with this change), but when validating the data it tells me in the error log that "the link is already uploaded" over the other links that I have not modified and it won't let me publish them.

So, how can I update a specific link? What is the H_RECORD_TYPE value for now? What are the validity dates for? Right now it also doesn't let me change the validity dates without giving me an error that I must cover the entire period.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Need to add data into UDT via DI API SAP Business One...
entry.content:
Hi nikunjmehta2290,

  • If the UDT is No Object Type, you can insert the data.
  • If the UDO is registered for this UDT, the data can be inserted automatically.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh Service Key Creation failed

Hi,

yes this service key will contain all the needed credentials, if you had enabled them while creating the service instance (according to your posted JSON config, you have enabled them). 😉

Best regards,
Tobias

Discussions are part of the new site (for Application Development discussions, it's top menu > Groups > Application Development).

All Q&A are part of top menu > Products and Technology (CAUTION: for all software questions, do NOT choose "... SAP Websites" which are reserved to questions about SAP Community Website and so on).

The moderators are those who are in charge of problematic content:

entry.title: Filter for Version Category Property
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a lot of Budget and Actual versions in my story and I need a filter on the "Category" property of the Version dimension to distinguish between what is Actual and what is Budget and filter dynamically my table. 

Is it possible?

If not, I would like to have a solution so that the user cannot select Actual and Budget versions at the same time but can select more that one Actual OR Budget versions at the same time.

Hope you can help me 🙂

Martina

entry.title: IFRS16 ROU accounting- first time
entry.content:
Please could someone advise on how to account for first time postings for Leases? I have been informed I need to add a new fixed asset - Transaction AS-01 followed by transaction KO-01 then KO-02 

1. could somebody kindly confirm this is correct? 

2. Once an asset is created what is the next steps 

3. Is interest manual posted every month? 

Any help would be much appreciated - New to SAP using SAP Hana

entry.title: Re: fecha de documento posterior oferta de ventas
entry.content:
Pero, si le das ok o aceptar te deja seguir... 

Salvo que tengas parametrizado que no deje insertar documentos con fecha anterior....

Ten en cuenta que abrir ese melón de fecha anterior es para todos los documentos, no solo las ofertas.

entry.title: Re: sap business one account nature
entry.content: The system does not understand natures or origins, it depends on where you locate the account and in what transactions you parameterize or use it.
